workplan: Ingest business data, search live web for competitors and trends, extract anomalies.
reasoning: Maujooda data ka tajziya karne ke baad, yeh wazeh hai ke hamare internal delivery costs (CSV data) aur bahar ki haqeeqat (fuel price mein izafa, customer ki shikayat, logistics ki nayi qeematain) ke beech aik bara ikhtilaaf hai. Customer delivery charges se khush nahi hain aur muqablay-baaz discounts aur free delivery jaisi offers de rahe hain. Garmi ka mausam aik naya mauqa de raha hai. Hamein foran apne delivery costs ko theek karna hoga, customer ki shikayaton par ghaur karna hoga aur muqablay-baazon ki tarah attractive offers deni hongi. Garmi ke rujhaan ko istemal karte hue naye products ya promotions shamil kiye ja sakte hain.
decision: Hamein foran delivery costs ka dobara jaiza lena chahiye aur unhe naye halaat ke mutabiq update karna chahiye. Customer ki shikayaton ko hal karne ke liye delivery charges mein kami ya free delivery ki offers par ghaur karna chahiye, khaas tor par agar muqablay-baaz aisa kar rahe hain. Garmi ke mausam ke liye thande mashroobaat ya special deals shamil karni chahiye taake sales barh sakein aur customer ko apni taraf kheench sakein.
output_summary: Found insights and integrated live trends.

workplan: Generate action chain, verify budget constraints, and predict ROI.
reasoning: Sab se pehle, humne delivery ke asal kharchay dobara calculate karne ka faisla kiya hai. Ye sab se zaroori hai kyunke agar hamare paas sahih data nahi hoga to hum koi bhi sahih faisla nahi kar sakte. Is se hamare andar ki maloomat sahih ho jayengi aur humein pata chalega ke asal mein kitna kharcha ho raha hai. Dusra, hum customer ki shikayaton ka jawab denge aur unhein self-pickup ka option zyada wazeh tareeqay se batayenge. Is se customer ki narazgi kam hogi aur unhein lagega ke hum unki baat sun rahe hain. Self-pickup se hamare delivery ke kharchay bhi kam ho sakte hain. Teesra, hum garmi ke mausam ko dekhte hue aik khas offer shuru karenge aur iske sath delivery charges ko bhi wazeh tareeqay se batayenge. Ye hamare muqablay-baaz ki free delivery wali offer ka jawab bhi hoga aur customer ko aik naya faida bhi milega. Is se sales barhengi aur customer ka bharosa bhi barhega. Ye sab qadam mil kar hamare business ko sahih raaste par layenge, kharchay kam karenge, aur customer ko khush karenge. Poora budget 14000 PKR hai jo ke 15000 PKR ki had ke andar hai.
decision: Delivery costs ko sahih karna, customer ki shikayaton ko hal karna, aur garmi ke mausam ki offer ke sath muqablay-baaz ka jawab dena.

workplan: Search Pakistani trends → Generate bilingual ad copy → Create Pakistani ad image & promo video.
reasoning: The ad copy leverages the 'Garmi ka Mausam' trend by offering refreshing items and promoting convenience during the heat, using a casual, friendly Pakistani tone with FOMO elements. The strategy of promoting self-pickup and transparent delivery charges is subtly woven in by highlighting the benefits (extra savings, clear details) without mentioning past issues or competitors. The product/brand 'Hamare delivery ke asal kharch' is interpreted as the service's commitment to transparent delivery costs, rather than a literal brand name, to maintain a positive tone. The image prompt focuses on visually appealing, culturally relevant food and drinks in a vibrant summer setting. The video prompt creates a dynamic narrative showcasing the product's benefits, the summer trend, and the strategic elements like self-pickup and transparent service, all while maintaining a positive, aspirational, and brand-focused aesthetic. All critical copywriting rules, especially avoiding negative language, using Roman Urdu, and adhering to English sentence limits, have been strictly followed.
decision: The generated content effectively addresses all aspects of the prompt, integrating the trend data, strategy context, and copywriting rules into a cohesive and impactful set of creative assets for AutoCampaign AI.
